title: Add retry to queue.enqueue
summary: enqueue should transparently retry failed sends via retryWithBackoff so transient errors don't surface to callers.

claims.statement: enqueue now retries on failure instead of throwing on the first error.
claims.detail: Expected: a test asserts that a send failing once then succeeding is observed as a single successful enqueue.

claims.statement: retryWithBackoff is on the call path from enqueue to send.
claims.detail: Call graph should show enqueue → retryWithBackoff → send.
